title: [ETC] Extract a parent array instead of individual array access

features.name: array_index_inout on array_typed wire
features.description: Code should include an sv.wire with array type being indexed with array_index_inout to access individual elements

features.name: cover property accessing array element via index
features.description: Code should include sv.cover statements accessing individual array elements within an always @(posedge) block

features.name: array wire with element indexing for instance port connection
features.description: Code should include an array-typed wire whose elements are connected to a module instance via indexing operations
